title: corylus avellana var. avellana
intro: Corylus avellana var. avellana, also known as English or Common Hazel, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corylus avellana var. avellana include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and providing antioxidant protection. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies such as hazelnut oil and hazelnut flour.
